recommendations.title: Little Nemo: Adventures in Slumberland
recommendations.overview: A little boy whose dreams transcend reality is sucked into his own fantasy, which is everything he has dreamed of, until he unleashes an old secret that may not only destroy this perfect dream world but reality itself.
recommendations.director: William T. Hurtz, Masanori Hata, Masami Hata

recommendations.title: Passion Play
recommendations.overview: An angel under the thumb of a ruthless gangster is saved by a trumpet player down on his luck.

recommendations.title: London Boulevard
recommendations.overview: A parolee falls for a reclusive movie star while trying to evade a ruthless gangster.

recommendations.title: Miami Connection
recommendations.overview: In a world where ninjas dream of being rock stars and rock stars dream of being ninjas, a martial arts rock band goes up against a band of motorcycle ninjas who have tightened their grip on Florida's narcotics trade.

recommendations.title: Red White & Blue
recommendations.overview: A woman attracts the attention of a psychotic former Army interrogator and an emotionally fragile young man caring for his ailing mother.

recommendations.title: The Shadow Effect
recommendations.overview: A young man's life is turned upside down when his violent dreams begin to blend with reality.

recommendations.title: Swiss Army Man

recommendations.title: The Yin-Yang Master: Dream of Eternity
recommendations.genres: Action, Drama, Fantasy, Mystery, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Every few hundred years, the most powerful demon on earth—a snake demon—awakens, and the Yin-Yang Masters are summoned to the capital. Meanwhile, the Princess of the realm has her own plans, as she conspires to claim the demon’s power.

recommendations.title: A Whisker Away
recommendations.overview: A peculiar girl transforms into a cat to catch her crush's attention. But before she realizes it, the line between human and animal starts to blur.

recommendations.title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime the Movie: Scarlet Bond
